arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Napoli vs Genoa – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Sunday's Serie A program ends at Stadio Diego Maradona as title-bidding Napoli take on bottom-half Genoa in a must-win fixture. Driving toward the finish line, Antonio Conte's charges boast a three-point lead over reigning champions and fiercest competitors Inter Milan pre-round. The post Serie A Preview: Napoli vs Genoa – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
